loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative energy for this month across panel members; SEC (kWh/t) is omitted as no production tonnage is measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy trends for the 23 primary outgoing feeders; 3 feeders (Axial Fan Panel-2, Curing Line CSU-01, Fire Fighting System) are dark and omitted from the trend.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live apparent power and active/reactive power breakdown; capacity marker and load factor are omitted because rated_kva is unknown and load factor metrics are not logged for this panel's members.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing Worst Peak and per-feeder demand series (UPS, BPDP, HHF); Load Factor and Critical Demand Threshold are omitted because the required computed ratio and nameplate rating are not available for this asset.
